nasb.text: But the sons of Manasseh could not take possession of these cities, because the Canaanites persisted in living in that land.

esv.text: Yet the people of Manasseh could not take possession of those cities, but the Canaanites persisted in dwelling in that land.

cnv.text: 可是瑪拿西的子孫卻不能把這些城的居民趕走，迦南人決意住在那地。

ccb.text: 可是，玛拿西人没能把这些城邑的迦南人赶走，因为他们执意不肯离开。
